title: Reader Outcomes, Publisher Stewardship, and Service Charter · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations review reconstructs reader outcomes, publisher stewardship, and service charter from revision, tenant, source URL, request validators, response bytes, parsed identity, transaction, lease, state transition, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for reader-centered feed-service charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Define reader group, decision, task journey, freshness need, harm, and observable value before choosing architecture.
Define respectful fetch frequency, identification, caching, opt-out, correction, deletion, and incident contacts for publishers.
Separate discovery, fetch, parse, normalize, persist, schedule, serve, and present responsibilities with explicit ports.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Feed Go Reader Decision · changed case · Review Feed Go Reader Decision
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 3591 during an isolated backup restore exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a useful reader and publisher service charter on observable decisions and inclusive evidence; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then change one tenant, cursor, reader-state, authorization, cache, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

Which action demonstrates Feed Go Reader Decision without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and Go Feed Go Reader Decision · changed case · Review Feed Go Reader Decision.
